name: blog-post-workflow
description: Allows you to show your latest blog posts on your github profile or project readme

scripts.test: yarn run lint && start-server-and-test start-server http://localhost:8080 test-run
scripts.test-ci: yarn run lint && start-server-and-test start-server http://localhost:8080 test-run-ci
scripts.test-run-dist-ci: DIST=true mocha --require test/setup.cjs --parallel --reporter json --reporter-option output=dist-report.json --jobs 100 test/**.js
scripts.test-dist: yarn run lint && start-server-and-test start-server http://localhost:8080 test-run-dist
scripts.test-dist-ci: yarn run lint && start-server-and-test start-server http://localhost:8080 test-run-dist-ci

author: Gautam krishna R <r.gautamkrishna@gmail.com> (https://www.github.com/gautamkrishnar)
